allow: Bash(for f in scripts/usr/lib/qmanager/cgi_at.sh scripts/usr/lib/qmanager/ethtool_helper.sh scripts/cgi/quecmanager/cellular/apn.sh scripts/cgi/quecmanager/profiles/current_settings.sh scripts/cgi/quecmanager/network/ethernet.sh scripts/etc/init.d/qmanager_eth_link)

Bash(for file in scripts/cgi/quecmanager/cellular/apn.sh scripts/cgi/quecmanager/cellular/imei.sh scripts/cgi/quecmanager/cellular/mbn.sh scripts/cgi/quecmanager/cellular/network_priority.sh scripts/cgi/quecmanager/cellular/settings.sh scripts/cgi/quecmanager/cellular/sms.sh scripts/cgi/quecmanager/network/dns.sh scripts/cgi/quecmanager/network/ethernet.sh scripts/cgi/quecmanager/network/ip_passthrough.sh scripts/cgi/quecmanager/network/mtu.sh scripts/cgi/quecmanager/network/ttl.sh scripts/cgi/quecmanager/system/logs.sh)
